name: Cuong Le Nguyen
headline: Product leader building AI-enabled and B2B products across eCommerce, LegalTech, healthcare workflows, and digital operations.
core_pitch: Product leader with experience owning end-to-end delivery from discovery and requirement definition to launch, iteration, and cross-functional alignment. Strongest in operations-heavy product environments where process clarity, user pain points, and measurable outcomes matter more than product theater.

cover_letter_rules: keep final output concise and formal
prefer measurable outcomes and operational proof
show Germany motivation through structure, integration, and long-term fit
do not drift into blog-style tangents in final application documents

germany_motivation: Pursuing a double-degree path through Vietnamese-German University and Heilbronn University
Interested in structured, systems-oriented environments that connect technology with operational responsibility
Motivated by long-term integration into Germany's product and technology ecosystem rather than short-term relocation

education.degree: BA in Business Administration and General Management

work_history.title: Senior Product Owner
highlights: Managed end-to-end delivery for assigned projects from kickoff to launch
Led backlog and roadmap for AEON's iAEON super-app
Shipped gamification initiatives including Lucky Wheel, daily check-in, and progress-bar experiences
Mentored three junior Business Analysts and formalized Jira, Confluence, and OKR templates

work_history.title: Product Development Manager
highlights: Built platform features and customer experience for a Vietnamese mechanical marketplace
Led cross-functional delivery across operations, engineering, and product design
Developed and deployed an AI chatbot using Botpress and OpenAI for FAQ and price lookup support

work_history.title: Associate Product Manager
highlights: Improved onboarding experiences for private capital firms
Coordinated with legal and vendors to support EU AES and QES signing requirements
Migrated project management from Airtable to Jira to improve prioritization capacity
Partnered with Customer Success and Data teams to address NPS drivers

work_history.title: Product Owner
highlights: Improved patient-care and clinical workflows with compliance-aware initiatives
Shipped an OCR note-reading feature that improved doctor productivity and supported a major UK project

work_history.title: Business Analyst
highlights: Delivered requirements and documentation for multi-industry projects
Launched a self-service app suite for gym members that replaced legacy workflows
Authored user stories, acceptance criteria, process diagrams, and workflows

projects.name: RouteOps
projects.description: Travel-planning decision-support prototype with a local Fastify backend, deterministic planning outputs, and saved trip history.

projects.name: AI-Powered WordPress CMS Portal
projects.description: Private portal that connects WordPress sites to an AI-assisted content workflow with review and change tracking.

awards: Advanced Product Management: Vision, Strategy & Metric - Udemy
UI UX 101: Digital Product Design - Keyframe HCM
Foundation of Project Management - Google on Coursera
Project Initiation - Starting a successful project - Google on Coursera
portfolio_recap: Writes in a reflective, systems-oriented tone with a strong focus on what worked, what failed, and what should change next
Frames AI and engineering work through product discipline, context management, and practical execution
Highlights Germany motivation through study, structure, integration, and long-term contribution
Uses case studies to connect product decisions with operational consequences
